0.question: Iki cyapa gisobanura:
options: Uburenganzira bwo gutambuka mbere mu yandi masangano y'umuhanda akwegereye
Ibyago imbere mu masangano y'umuhanda ukwegereye
A na B ni ibisubizo by'ukuri

4.question: Mu gihe hari undi muyobozi w'ikinyabiziga ugukurikiye watangiye kukunyuraho:
4.swer: Ntugomba kugira undi muyobozi w'ikinyabiziga unyuraho
options: Ntugomba kugira undi muyobozi w'ikinyabiziga unyuraho
Ugomba kunyura kukindi kinyabiziga uvugije ihoni

5.question: Ikinyabiziga ntigishobora kugira amatara arenga abiri y'ubwoko bumwe keretse kubyerekeye amatara akurikira:

6.question: Uretse mu mujyi kuyindi mihanda yajyenwe na minisitiri ushinzwe gutwara abantu n'ibintu, uburemere ntarengwa ku binyabiziga bifite imitambiko itatu cyangwa irenga hatarimo mukuzungu ni:

7.question: Hejuru y'aka kanunga:
options: Nshobora kunyura ku kinyabiziga icyo aricyose mu gihe nagabanyije umuvuduko
nshobora kunyura gusa kubinyabiziga by'imitende ibiri
a na b ni ibisubizo by'ukuri

8.question: i mu nsisiro umuvuduko ntarengwa wa velomoteri mu isaha ni:

9.question: i hejuru cyane y'ubuso bumurika h'amatara ndangambere na ndanganyuma ntihashobora kuba aharenze ibipimo bikurikira hejuru y'ubutaka iyo ikinyabiziga kidapakiye:

10.question: Mbere yo kunyura ku kindi kinyabiziga, ni ngombwa kumenya ko:
10.swer: Umuhanda ubona neza, no kwitondera kunyuranaho
options: Umuhanda ubona neza, no kwitondera kunyuranaho
Ikinyabiziga kinturutse imbere gishaka gukatira ibuumoso

11.question: Ku mihanda ibyapa bikurikira bigomba kugaragazwa ku buryo bumwe:

12.question: Iyo nta mategeko awugabanya by'umwihariko, umuvuduko ntarengwa ku modoka zitwara abagenzi mu buryo bwa rusange ni:

13.question: mwe muri ubu bwoko bwa feri ituma imodoka iguma aho iri uko yaba yikoreye kose ku muzamuko cyangwa ku gacuri bya 16%, imyanya ya feri igomba gufata igakomeza kwegera kuburyo bw'ibyuma niyo umuyobozi yaba atarimo:

14.question: Icyapa kibuza kunyura kubindi binyabiziga byose uretse ibinyamitende ibiri n'amapikipiki adafite akanyabiziga ku ruhande gifite ibimenyetso by'amabara akurikira:
options: A na B ni ibisubizo by'ukuri

15.question: Iki cyapa gisobanura iki?
options: Birabujijwe ku binyabiziga bitwara abakozi ba leta
Birabujijwe ku binyabiziga by'abikorera ki giti cyabo

16.question: Ubugari bwa romoruki ikuruwe n'igare cyangwa velomoteri ntiburenza ibipimo bikurikira:

17.question: Ibinyabiziga bikoreshwa nka tagisi, bitegerereza abantu mu nzira nyabagendwa, bishobora gushyirwaho itara ryerekana ko ikinyabiziga kitakodeshejwe. Iryo tara rishyirwaho ku buryo bukurikira:
17.swer: Ni itara ry'icyatsi rishyirwa imbere ku kinyabiziga
options: Ni itara ry'icyatsi rishyirwa imbere ku kinyabiziga
A na C ni ibisubizo by'ukuri

19.question: Ikindi kinyabiziga kiguturutse inyuma kiguterera amatara y'urumuri rumyasa, wakora iki?
19.swer: Emerera icyo kinyabiziga kugutambukaho niba imbere ntacyago gihari
options: Kongera umuvuduko kugira ngo intera iri hagati yawe n'ukuri inyuma igumeho
Fata feri y'urugendo kugira ngo umwereke ko ugiye guhagarara
Emerera icyo kinyabiziga kugutambukaho niba imbere ntacyago gihari
